completed_tasks.name: Build binary and prepare test environment
Human verification — extensive bug-fix and UX sessions
completed_tasks.progress: Offset-based Range tracking, annotation highlights, hover text→card, auto-focus textarea, aligned card layout (scroll sync + absolute positioning). All built, not yet user-tested.

remaining_tasks.name: User confirms all test scenarios pass

human_actions_pending.action: Test the binary. Verify: (1) selection highlight persists after clicking Comment, (2) annotation cards align to selection Y level in sidebar, (3) sidebar cards scroll in sync with plan, (4) hover over highlighted text highlights matching sidebar card, (5) clicking Comment auto-focuses textarea.
human_actions_pending.context: Aligned card layout just implemented this session — not yet user-tested.

decisions.decision: Offset-based selection (getRangeOffsets/rangeFromOffsets) instead of live Range
decisions.rationale: Live Range objects collapse when React reconciliation touches dangerouslySetInnerHTML

decisions.decision: annotationOffsetsRef Map<id,{start,end}> instead of annotationRangesRef Map<id,Range>
decisions.rationale: Same root cause — stored Ranges collapse after re-renders

decisions.decision: useLayoutEffect (no deps) to rebuild annotation CSS highlights each render
decisions.rationale: useEffect([annotations]) ran after paint with already-collapsed Ranges

decisions.decision: document.addEventListener mousemove instead of planRef listener
decisions.rationale: planRef.current is null at mount; document listener works regardless of when plan mounts

decisions.decision: computeAndApplyLayout() imperative DOM updates, no React state
decisions.rationale: Scroll-driven updates must not trigger React re-renders

decisions.decision: Estimated card heights (delete=100px, comment/replace=212px) for collision resolution
data-cards-scroll overflow:hidden, scrollTop synced to planTab.scrollTop
decisions.rationale: Cards move with plan text without independent sidebar scroll

next_action: Ask user to test the binary. If aligned layout needs tweaks, adjust estimated heights in computeAndApplyLayout (delete=100, comment/replace=212). When all scenarios pass, commit all changes, write 02-04-SUMMARY.md, update STATE/ROADMAP, run /gsd:code-review 2 and /gsd:verify-work.
context_notes: Phase 02 plan 02-04 extended verification. Plans 01-03 committed. This session fixed: Range collapse (offset tracking), annotation highlights (useLayoutEffect + offsets), hover text→card (document mousemove + caretRangeFromPoint), auto-focus textarea (useLayoutEffect DOM query), aligned card layout (computeAndApplyLayout imperative + scroll sync). Binary built via cargo build. All changes in working tree, not committed.
